title: Prehistoric fossils (mobile)
description: optimized to run Prehistoric Nature on Mobile
body:
**The differences between this modpack vs Prehistoric fossils is that I tweak and added many performance mods to make sure this modpack run smoothly on mobile If you need Optifine, you need to add that manually.** 

**this modpack integrates the Prehistoric Nature mod, plus its dimensions, and a few basic support mods added, Optimized for mobile this version ensures smooth gameplay so you can play anytime, anywhere**
 

###    For optimal performance
**we recommend to allocate at least 4GB RAM or more to run the modpack ideally**
 
### optifine
**there should be no issue using optifine in this modpack**
